work_unit: scout-scan IGNORE_DIRS: add out/target for build output exclusion
situation: scout-scan IGNORE_DIRS excluded .venv-sidecar and site-packages but missed out/ (Electron/Vite build output) and target/ (Rust cargo output). x-tool reported 5 TODOs; investigation showed they came from x-tool/moni/ (a real subdirectory, not out/), so the out/ exclusion is preventive. target/ prevents future false positives when moni Rust port matures.
action: Added 'out' and 'target' to IGNORE_DIRS set in scripts/scout-scan.py. Also investigated x-tool's 5 TODOs: they are real (broker_qmt.py stubs in x-tool/moni/ subdir), not false positives from build output.
outcome_evidence: os.walk debug confirmed out/ is pruned after fix; IGNORE_DIRS now contains 'out' and 'target'; committed to opt-scout-scan-1782618644
next_suggestion: Commit orphaned case files (049, 050) sitting in AS main dirty; or triage x-tool/moni/broker_qmt.py TODO stubs (mark deferred if not actionable now)
